prompt: I need to find all Azure VMs that had more than 90% memory usage in the past 3 days, and I want to see which ones are consistently running hot versus just spiking. This is for a capacity planning review we're doing next week. Target: Log Analytics.

assertions.text: Output includes standard .kql comment header block (Title, Service, Tables, Description, Parameters, Complexity)
Uses Perf table (or InsightsMetrics) for memory counters
Includes TimeGenerated filter for 3 days (ago(3d) or equivalent)
Uses let statements for parameterized values (time range, threshold)
Distinguishes between sustained high memory and temporary spikes (e.g., via binned aggregation, percentiles, or duration counting)
Uses correct memory performance counter (% Committed Bytes In Use or Available MBytes)
